message:
🌱 Add operator-framework: Predictable Release Names with the Helm Operator SDK mission (#1619)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "operator-framework-1094-predictable-release-names-with-the-helm-operator-sdk",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "operator-framework: Predictable Release Names with the Helm Operator SDK",
+    "description": "Predictable Release Names with the Helm Operator SDK. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current operator-framework deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your operator-framework version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework\nhelm list -n operator-framework 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working operator-framework installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review operator-framework configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant operator-framework configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework\nkubectl get configmap -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=operator-framework\n```\n## Type of question\n\nGeneral context and help around the operator-sdk.\n\n## Question\n\n**What did you do?**\n\nDeployed a Helm Operator for a chart and then created a `CustomResource` for it."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Predictable Release Names with the Helm Operator SDK",
+        "description": "I remembered we had some discussion about the release name in https://github.com/operator-framework/helm-app-operator-kit/issues/49 and https://github.com/operator-framework/helm-app-operator-kit/pull/57 before we integrated the Helm support into the SDK, so check that out for background about how\n```yaml\noc new-project gitlab\n\noc adm policy add-scc-to-user anyuid -z default\noc adm policy add-scc-to-user anyuid -z gitlab-shared-secrets\n\noc create secret tls apps-ocplab-com --cert=$TLS_PATH/fullchain.pem --key=$TLS_PATH/privkey.pem\n\nhelm upgrade --install gitlab gitlab/gitlab \\\n  --timeout 600 \\\n  --set global.hosts.domain=apps.ocplab.com \\\n  --set global.hosts.externalIP=10.10.10.10 \\\n  --set certmanager-issuer.email=gnunn@redhat.com \\\n  --set nginx-ingress.enabled=false \\\n  --set prometheus.install=false \\\n  --set certmanager.install=false \\\n  --set global.ingress.configureCertmanager=false \\\n\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade operator-framework to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade operator-framework:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade operator-framework operator-framework/operator-framework --namespace operator-framework\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n operator-framework\nhelm list -n operator-framework\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework\nkubectl get events -n operator-framework --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Predictable Release Names with the Helm Operator SDK\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I remembered we had some discussion about the release name in https://github.com/operator-framework/helm-app-operator-kit/issues/49 and https://github.com/operator-framework/helm-app-operator-kit/pull/57 before we integrated the Helm support into the SDK, so check that out for background about how we ended up with the current release name.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "oc new-project gitlab\n\noc adm policy add-scc-to-user anyuid -z default\noc adm policy add-scc-to-user anyuid -z gitlab-shared-secrets\n\noc create secret tls apps-ocplab-com --cert=$TLS_PATH/fullchain.pem --key=$TLS_PATH/privkey.pem\n\nhelm upgrade --install gitlab gitlab/gitlab \\\n  --timeout 600 \\\n  --set global.hosts.domain=apps.ocplab.com \\\n  --set global.hosts.externalIP=10.10.10.10 \\\n  --set certmanager-issuer.email=gnunn@redhat.com \\\n  --set nginx-ingress.enabled=false \\\n  --set prometheus.install=false \\\n  --set certmanager.install=false \\\n  --set global.ingress.configureCertmanager=false \\\n  --set global.ingress.tls.secretName=apps-ocplab-com"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "operator-framework",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "operator-framework"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment",
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/operator-framework/operator-sdk/issues/1094",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/operator-framework/operator-sdk"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 16,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with operator-framework installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-21T06:26:10.824Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
